title: Half Angels and Redeye
wikitext:
[]: Half-Angels and Redeye.             Quote Post by JUSTINBAILEY » Wed Feb 23, 2011 7:57 pm Is it ever stated anywhere that Angel/Human hybrids have red eyes? Tabris and Rei are manufactured humans with angel DNA right? Is it just a coincidence that they are the only ones in the series with red eyes while simultaneously being hybrids?

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Wed Feb 23, 2011 8:55 pm I have a theory that their irises are parts of their core.

[]:             Quote Post by JUSTINBAILEY » Wed Feb 23, 2011 10:59 pm TehDonutKing wrote: I have a theory that their irises are parts of their core.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Feb 23, 2011 11:38 pm TehDonutKing wrote: I have a theory that their irises are parts of their core.

[]:             Quote Post by funeral_fog » Thu Feb 24, 2011 9:53 am JUSTINBAILEY wrote: Oooh, that's a good one; never thought about that. Hey are lillins ever shown to have cores by the way? I'm thinking no but I could be wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by Aozora » Thu Feb 24, 2011 12:40 pm JUSTINBAILEY wrote: Oooh, that's a good one; never thought about that. Hey are lillins ever shown to have cores by the way? I'm thinking no but I could be wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Feb 24, 2011 2:14 pm It's just a stylistic thing to show that they're creepy.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Feb 24, 2011 2:39 pm AuraTwilight wrote: It's just a stylistic thing to show that they're creepy.

[]:             Quote Post by Spud » Thu Feb 24, 2011 4:11 pm Wouldn't the soul be the core for the lillin? They don't have the red sphere so wouldn't the soul be the logical answer?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Feb 24, 2011 4:20 pm The "core" of a human would be the brain - i.e. the part you need to demolish, or, as we lack the fruit of life, deprive of its oxygen in some way to kill them.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Feb 24, 2011 5:16 pm Kendrix wrote: The "core" of a human would be the brain - i.e. the part you need to demolish, or, as we lack the fruit of life, deprive of its oxygen in some way to kill them.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Feb 24, 2011 7:19 pm Spud wrote: Wouldn't the soul be the core for the lillin? They don't have the red sphere so wouldn't the soul be the logical answer?

[]:             Quote Post by JUSTINBAILEY » Fri Feb 25, 2011 2:23 am Hey, Tabris has a extremely powerful ATF right? If Rei is the same, shouldn't she be able to use an ATF too? Or is Lilith and lillin based life-forms incapable, even though they are technically angels too.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Feb 25, 2011 2:35 am JUSTINBAILEY wrote: Hey, Tabris has a extremely powerful ATF right? If Rei is the same, shouldn't she be able to use an ATF too? Or is Lilith and lillin based life-forms incapable, even though they are technically angels too.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Feb 25, 2011 3:25 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Feb 25, 2011 4:35 am it's also possible that a bit of Lilith's soul is still in the marshmallowy corpse (the part that says welcome home in EoE), and thus she might also needs to be in close proximity to her true body to make that work at full power.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Fri Feb 25, 2011 10:43 am Aozora wrote: I figured the little red spheres in EoE were essentially human cores. The core is where the soul is right? And GNR was collecting people souls which just happen to look like tiny cores.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Mon Mar 07, 2011 4:58 pm Are the AT Fields really being suppressed? I don't think that's the right word there--I clearly recall Maya saying that "everybody's AT Fields are fading " right before she gets Tanged. So more or less, the Anti-A.T. Field (which I don't think is really the opposite of an AT Field, more "Lilith using her godlike powers to Tang everybody") is pulling down/destroying/"fading" everybody's AT Field. The AT Field could be the only containment of the soul, and thus, when the AT Field is gone, the soul is released.
